_notes: Rotation reminders fire 14 days before expiry via weekly_planner.py extension (Phase 5 future scope). For now — keep a manual calendar reminder per entry below.

ASC_REPORTER_ACCESS_TOKEN.rotation_steps_url: https://appstoreconnect.apple.com/trends/reports → About Reports → Generate Reporter Token → Regenerate
ASC_REPORTER_ACCESS_TOKEN.notes: Apple invalidates the previous Reporter token immediately on Regenerate. Rotate ≥14 days before expiry to avoid digest gap.

BOT_DISPATCH_PAT.rotation_steps_url: https://github.com/settings/personal-access-tokens — fine-grained PAT для Carbon1777/forton-lab-marketing only, scopes: Contents:write + Actions:write + Metadata:read
BOT_DISPATCH_PAT.notes: GitHub fine-grained PAT. Old token остаётся валидным до явного revoke — обновляй secret сначала, потом revoke в Settings.

RUSTORE_KEY_ID.rotation_steps_url: https://console.rustore.ru → Разработчик → API RuStore → Создание ключа
RUSTORE_KEY_ID.notes: RuStore не декларирует TTL для API ключей. Ротация только при компрометации private key или явном revoke в Console.
